query: SELECT id, agent_name, level, dominant_element, hp, max_hp, mp, max_mp, attack, defense, speed, magic_attack, gold, stamina, max_stamina, equipped_weapon, equipped_head, equipped_body, equipped_feet, equipped_ring_a, equipped_ring_b, equipped_necklace, equipped_amulet, equipped_offhand, equipped_hands FROM game_agents WHERE user_id = '1' LIMIT 1;
